title: Technology essentials
description: Useful words for science, innovation, and the impact of new technology.

items.meaning: to cause or encourage new ideas and inventions
items.example: Competition between companies can drive innovation.

items.meaning: careful study done to discover new facts
items.example: Scientific research often requires long-term funding.

items.meaning: to fix problems that affect everyday life
items.example: Technology should help solve real-world problems, not create more of them.
Social media has had a huge social impact in the last decade.

items.meaning: to use technology in a careful and ethical way
items.example: Students need to learn how to use technology responsibly.

items.meaning: to stay updated as new things develop quickly
items.example: Older institutions sometimes struggle to keep pace with change.
